reasoning: The control requires cryptographic mechanisms to protect the confidentiality of remote access sessions. In Kubernetes, this can be mapped to ensuring TLS is enabled for API server communications, ingress traffic, service mesh communications, and etcd data transport. These are critical areas where encryption protects data in transit, aligning with the control's requirement.
title: 3_1_13: 3.1.13 Employ cryptographic mechanisms to protect the confidentiality of remote access sessions
